query:
-- Delete existing March 26 rows
DELETE FROM mlb_strikeout_props WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009);

-- Game 1: PIT @ NYN
-- Paul Skenes (PIT, away) — kProj=6.46, book=6.5, P(O)=46.0%, P(U)=54.0%, NEUTRAL
INSERT INTO mlb_strikeout_props
  (gameId, pitcherName, pitcherHand, mlbamId, retrosheetId, teamAbbr, isHome,
   kProj, kLine, kPer9, kMedian, kP5, kP95,
   bookLine, bookOverOdds, bookUnderOdds,
   pOver, pUnder, edgeOver, edgeUnder, verdict, bestSide, bestEdge,
   publishedToFeed, runAt)
VALUES
  (2250007, 'Paul Skenes', 'RHP', 694973, 'skenp001', 'PIT', 0,
   6.46, 6.5, 11.02, 6.0, 2.0, 12.0,
   6.5, 105, -138,
   0.4600, 0.5400, -0.0280, -0.0390, 'NEUTRAL', 'under', 0.0390,
   0, NOW()),

-- Freddy Peralta (NYN, home) — kProj=5.88, book=6.5, P(O)=37.5%, P(U)=62.5%, NEUTRAL
  (2250007, 'Freddy Peralta', 'RHP', 642547, 'peraf001', 'NYN', 1,
   5.88, 6.0, 10.02, 6.0, 2.0, 11.0,
   6.5, 118, -154,

   0, NOW()),

-- Shane Smith (CHA, away) — kProj=5.56, book=4.5, P(O)=62.9%, P(U)=37.1%, OVER +13.4pp
  (2250008, 'Shane Smith', 'RHP', 681343, 'smits003', 'CHA', 0,

   4.5, 102, -118,

   0, NOW()),

-- Jacob Misiorowski (MIL, home) — kProj=5.72, book=6.5, P(O)=35.2%, P(U)=64.8%, UNDER +5.2pp
  (2250008, 'Jacob Misiorowski', 'RHP', 694819, 'misij001', 'MIL', 1,
   5.72, 6.5, 9.75, 6.0, 2.0, 11.0,
   6.5, 111, -147,
   0.3520, 0.6480, -0.1210, 0.0520, 'EDGE UNDER', 'under', 0.0520,
   0, NOW()),

-- Game 3: WAS @ CHN
-- Cade Cavalli (WAS, away) — kProj=6.25, book=4.0, P(O)=71.2%, P(U)=28.8%, OVER +19.3pp
  (2250009, 'Cade Cavalli', 'RHP', 676917, 'cavac001', 'WAS', 0,
   6.25, 6.5, 10.82, 6.0, 2.0, 11.0,
   4.0, -108, -119,
   0.7120, 0.2880, 0.1930, -0.2560, 'EDGE OVER', 'over', 0.1930,
   0, NOW()),

-- Matthew Boyd (CHN, home) — kProj=4.64, book=5.5, P(O)=32.5%, P(U)=67.5%, UNDER +10.2pp
  (2250009, 'Matthew Boyd', 'LHP', 571510, 'boydm001', 'CHN', 1,

   5.5, 105, -134,
